'''Wali''' was [[V-Davi]]'s pet that he kept with him when in the [[Re-Learning Circle]]. Wali was a small, furry creature with a thin tail.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Fight for Truth]]'' {{1st}}
